column3: ['Identify a trainer or assessor involved in the assessment activities. ', 'Confirm that there are no financial pressures or incentives affecting their judgement or results. ', 'Verify that the remuneration does not depend on the number of assessments carried out or on the results of such assessments. ', 'Confirm that the CAA ensures impartiality in this scenario. ']
column4: ['A specific trainer or assessor is identified and confirmed to be actively participating in the assessment activities. ', 'The trainer or assessor confirms, either verbally or in writing, that they have no financial pressure or incentive that could affect their judgement or results of the assessment. ', "The trainer or assessor's remuneration is confirmed to be independent of the number of assessments they carry out and their assessment results. ", 'The CAA confirms, either verbally or in writing, that it has taken all reasonable steps to ensure impartiality and avoid conflicts of interest in this specific scenario. ']
